## About

children.text: Mermaid is a JavaScript-based diagramming and charting tool that uses Markdown-inspired text definitions and a

rects.text: Mermaid is a JavaScript-based diagramming and charting tool that uses Markdown-inspired text definitions and a

children.text: renderer to create and modify complex diagrams. The main purpose of Mermaid is to help documentation catch up with

rects.text: renderer to create and modify complex diagrams. The main purpose of Mermaid is to help documentation catch up with

children.text:
development.

> Doc-Rot is a Catch-22 that Mermaid helps to solve.

Diagramming and documentation costs precious

rects.text:
development.

> Doc-Rot is a Catch-22 that Mermaid helps to solve.

Diagramming and documentation costs precious

children.text:
developer time and gets outdated quickly.
But not having diagrams or docs ruins productivity and hurts organizational

rects.text:
developer time and gets outdated quickly.
But not having diagrams or docs ruins productivity and hurts organizational
learning.

rects.text: Mermaid addresses this problem by enabling users to create easily modifiable diagrams. It can also be made part of

## Release

For those who have the permission to do so:

children.text:
Update version number in `package.json`.

```sh
npm publish
```

The above command generates files into the `dist` folder

Security and safe diagrams

For public sites, it can be precarious to retrieve text from users on the internet, storing that

rects.text:
Security and safe diagrams

For public sites, it can be precarious to retrieve text from users on the internet, storing that

children.text: content for presentation in a browser at a later stage. The reason is that the user content can contain embedded malicious

rects.text: content for presentation in a browser at a later stage. The reason is that the user content can contain embedded malicious

children.text: scripts that will run when the data is presented. For Mermaid this is a risk, specially as mermaid diagrams contain many

rects.text: scripts that will run when the data is presented. For Mermaid this is a risk, specially as mermaid diagrams contain many

children.text: characters that are used in html which makes the standard sanitation unusable as it also breaks the diagrams. We still make

rects.text: characters that are used in html which makes the standard sanitation unusable as it also breaks the diagrams. We still make

children.text: an effort to sanitize the incoming code and keep refining the process but it is hard to guarantee that there are no loop holes.

rects.text: an effort to sanitize the incoming code and keep refining the process but it is hard to guarantee that there are no loop holes.

children.text: As an extra level of security for sites with external users we are happy to introduce a new security level in which the diagram

rects.text: As an extra level of security for sites with external users we are happy to introduce a new security level in which the diagram

children.text: is rendered in a sandboxed iframe preventing javascript in the code from being executed. This is a great step forward for
